fields.helpText: This field contains the terms describing a notification outcome.  An outcome may be a goal or an event (e.g., PAP normal letter sent, provider consult, CBE refused, scheduled appt for MAM).

This field contains a set of codes (1 = Yes, 0 = No) used to display or hide an entry in a selection list.  If the field is active and contains a '1' or yes, users of this package can select the entry.
